CustomField.formula: IF(Genetic_Testing_Promotion__c != NULL ||Aesthetics_Promotion__c != NULL || Sexual_Wellness_Promotion__c != NULL || Lab_Promotion__c != Null || Hormone_Evaluation_Promotion__c != NULL || Medical_Consultation_Promotion__c != NULL || Medication_Promotion__c != NULL, TRUE, FALSE)
CustomField.label: Promotion Applied
